title: Player-Avatar Identification
instructions: Here follows a questionnaire about your avatar

questions.title: Avatar
questions.text: Please answer the questions about your game experience

questions.instructions: Share your opinion on these questions

q_text.text: When my character is facing danger in the game, I feel nervous
I feel the same disappointment when my character experiences a failure in the game
When my character achieves his/her goals, I feel happy
I feel the same joy my character experiences when a task is accomplished
When my character was respected with other gamers, I feel proud
When my character was treated unfairly in the game, I feel angry
When my character was laughed at for low level or poor equipment, I feel upset
I feel the same excitement my character experiences when succeeding in a difficult quest
I have forgotten my surroundings during the game
I have forgotten myself during the game
I feel as if I am physically in the game world during the game
The problems I face are the same problems that my character faces
I never regret that I play my game character
I am proud to play the character I am playing now
Other gamers are happy to be friends with my game character
My co-gamers have high respect for my character
It is worthy to play my character
My co-gamers like the character I play
My co-gamers consider my character to be attractive
The characters I play reflect who I am
My character and I are one and the same
The characters I play influence the way I feel about myself
The characters I play are important to my sense of what kind of a person I am
